titleStmt.title: SII 28.189: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 189. (A.R. No. 344 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, east gōpuram, right of entrance.

p.hi: Vīra-pratāpa Tammarāyar Śaka 1425, Rudhirōdgāri, Siṁha śu. 14, Tiruvōṇam, Monday = 1503 A.D., August 6, which was, however, a Sunday-śu 14.78. Tiruvōṇam ·72.

summary.p: Records a gift for providing a garland of two strands and food-offerings daily to God Poṉṉambala-nāthar of Perumbaṟṟapuliyūr, a taṉiyūr in Vaḍakarai Irajādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu by Moṇṭukoḷi Rāmanāyakkar Malla-nāyakkar. It appears as if 47 mā of land both wet and dry in Kāri-kuḍi under the (or east of) Poṉnēri, a western hamlet (Perumbaṟṟapuliyūr ?) was purchased for 60 poṉ the price having been determined by mattiyattar (madhyasthar). Reference is made to some exceptions, a house-site for Chokk-nayinār-chattiram and some land for a maṭham.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran harirāya vibhāṭan pāṣaikku ttappuvarāya
rakhaṇḍan muvarāyar khaṇḍan kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātān satusa
mudrādhitipati śrīvira pratāpa tammarāyar pṛdhuvi rājyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa cakābdam
1�100 2 10 5n meṟ cellā niṉṟu Utiroṟkāri varuṣam siṁhanāyaṟṟu pūṟupakṣattu
caturddaśiyum tiruvoṇamum peṟṟa somavārattu nāḷ vaṭakarai Irācāti
rācavaḷanāṭṭu taniyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr Uṭaiyār poṉṉampalanātaṟku
moṇṭu koḷi rāma nāyakkar malla nāyakkar Īraṇaimālaiyum Iraṇṭu kuḻit
taḷikai Amutum Uriya neyyum Āḻākku miḷaku kaṟiyamutu paḻan teṅkāy caṟka
rai Aṭaikkāyamutum Uḷpaṭa tiṉantoṟum Amutu ceyyappaṇṇa tiruvampalam
Ūrār koyiṟ parikalattār kaiyil koṇṭu cetta melpiṭākai poṉneri kiḻ kāri kuṭi Ūr
Oṉṟu nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭa naṉcey nilam 2 4 10 5kalam ma2 puṉcey nilam kaḷa t
Inta nilam nāṟpatteḻu māvukkum vilaiyāka mattiyattār matitta poṉ 6 10 Inta
poṉ 6 10kkum koṇṭu cetta rūpāy4 10 7� kurukkaḷ cokkanayinār
cattirattukku pukaḻāparaṇaṉ tiruvitiil tiruvācali cetta maṉai kam
Amutuṅ kāri kuṭiyil 6Þ7Þrūpāy Eṉ maṭattukku 8Þm nikki
7Þ mahāpūcaikku kuṭutteṉ Ivai mallaya nāyakkaṉ The writing is careless.
Digital edition of SII 28.189 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
